title: Particly
description: A small mod which adds more Particles to your game!
body:
# ✨ Particly ✨

![text](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExd2h6OTU3OXRyNHo5cXJxNTk2Z2VwOWxtMm1idmRlbndseWx4MWhvMSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/9qbsyl6UzGojyCY2dG/giphy.gif)

✨ Enhance your project with a diverse range of particle effects designed to add depth and visual appeal!

🎨 These carefully crafted effects provide subtle yet noticeable improvements, creating a more dynamic and immersive environment.

🌍 Whether used for atmosphere, interaction, or visual feedback, they contribute to a more engaging and polished experience.

### Requirements
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 
  
But for other version a different api might be used, just check in the versions Tab!

### Config:

- **toggleMod** - To toggle mod On and Off
- **toggleFireParticles** - To toggle the Fire particles
- **toggleWaterParticles** - To toggle the Water particles
- **toggleCaveParticles** - To toggle the Cave particles
- **SetParticleBoundingBox** - Change to bounding box in which particles spawn



**Mod Inspired by [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular) by Chai**

<small>*Note that chatGPT wrote this description since im lazy 🤷
